Smile (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $105,935,048Details
International Box Office $111,103,773
Worldwide Box Office $217,038,821
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,955,929
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,427,756
Total $4,383,685
Further financial details...

Synopsis

After witnessing a bizarre, traumatic incident involving a patient, Dr. Rose Cotter starts experiencing frightening occurrences that she can’t explain. As an overwhelming terror begins taking over her life, Rose must confront her troubling past in order to survive and escape her horrifying new reality.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$22,609,925 (21.3% of total gross)
Legs:4.69 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:48.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$17,000,000 (worldwide box office is 12.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,650 opening theaters/3,659 max. theaters, 7.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $120,321,284

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 30th, 2022 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures

September 29th, 2022 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: November 15th, 2022 by Paramount Home Video

After witnessing a bizarre, traumatic incident involving a patient, Dr. Rose Cotter starts experiencing frightening occurrences that she can’t explain. As an overwhelming terror begins taking over her life, Rose must confront her troubling past in order to survive and escape her horrifying new reality.
